name: Breadcrumb
description: Horizontal breadcrumb navigation widget for IBM Business Automation Workflow

configOptions.name: showNumbering
configOptions.label: Show Numbering
configOptions.description: Display step numbers before breadcrumb labels (e.g., '1. Home')

configOptions.name: maxItems
configOptions.label: Max Items
configOptions.description: Maximum number of breadcrumb items to display (0 = no limit)

configOptions.name: onClick
configOptions.label: On Click
configOptions.description: Event fired when a breadcrumb item is clicked
